snippet.title: From Humble Beginnings to CEO of Exelon: The Story of Calvin Butler
snippet.description:
Join us on an inspiring journey through the remarkable story of Calvin Butler, a true testament to hard work, dedication, and success. 🚀

In this captivating video, we delve into the incredible rise of Calvin G. Butler Jr., the President and CEO of Exelon, one of the United States' largest energy companies. From his modest origins to his current prestigious position, Butler's journey exemplifies the power of perseverance and the pursuit of ambitious goals.

🔥 What You'll Discover:
🔹 Butler's early life and upbringing that laid the foundation for his exceptional career.
🔹 His educational journey at Bradley University and Washington University School of Law, which equipped him with valuable skills.
🔹 His pivotal roles at Central Illinois Light Company (CILCORP, Inc.) and R.R. Donnelley, providing insights into the energy and manufacturing sectors.
🔹 The pivotal moments that led to his role as CEO of Exelon and his impactful contributions to the company.
🔹 Butler's commitment to community involvement and leadership, recognized through various prestigious awards.

🔴 Join The Ladder Community:
Don't miss out on future videos that explore remarkable stories and achievements! Hit the like button and subscribe to our channel for exciting content delivered straight to you.

👑 Calvin Butler's Achievements:
Calvin Butler's journey is an embodiment of success. As the CEO of Exelon, he oversees six local electric and gas utilities, serving millions across different states. His leadership prowess has been acknowledged by numerous organizations, including The Daily Record's "Power 100" list and BEYA's Chairman’s Award.

💰 A Glimpse Into Success:
Discover insights into Calvin Butler's compensation and wealth. In 2020, his total compensation reached $15.4 million, reflecting his contributions and leadership. While his net worth remains undisclosed, his three-decade-long tenure in the energy industry undoubtedly positions him as a highly successful individual.

🔮 Navigating Challenges and Paving the Future:
Learn how Butler navigates strategic challenges in the energy industry, such as sustainability and competition. Exelon's commitment to renewable energy and innovation, driven by Butler's leadership, has kept the company at the forefront of change.

📈 Exelon's Impressive Trajectory:
Despite challenges, Exelon's stock price has surged over 30% in the last five years under Butler's leadership. The company's dedication to safety, reliability, and sustainability remains unwavering as it continues to diversify and expand its offerings.

🎯 Lessons for Aspiring Leaders:
Calvin Butler's journey teaches us that resilience and hard work are the cornerstones of success. His leadership style and strategic vision have propelled Exelon to new heights. Aspiring business leaders can draw inspiration from his story to elevate their careers.

👍 Let Us Know Your Thoughts:
If you found this video insightful, give it a thumbs up and share your thoughts in the comments section. Your feedback fuels our passion to bring you more incredible stories.

🔔 Stay Ahead of the Curve:
Want to be the first to catch our upcoming videos? Hit the notification bell to receive alerts whenever we release fresh content.

🙏 Thank You for Watching:
We appreciate your time and engagement. Stay tuned for more thought-provoking content as we continue to explore extraordinary journeys and achievements.

See you in the next video! 🎬

snippet.title: Global Circuit Exchange with Calvin Butler of Exelon
snippet.description:
In this Global Circuit Exchange, we sit down with Calvin Butler for a talk on leadership, Exelon Corporation, diversity, and his journey in the energy industry.

Speaker and Moderator:

Calvin Butler, President and CEO, Exelon Corporation (United States)
In conversation with Lawrence Jones, Senior Vice President – International Programs, Edison Electric Institute (United States)

EEI International Programs held the 7th Annual Global Electrification Forum from April 17-21, 2023. This conversation is from Day 2 of the GEF. For free on-demand access to all GEF 2023 sessions until April 14, 2024 please visit https://bit.ly/EEIGEF23.

snippet.title: Exelon Corporation's Calvin Butler on WH CEO meeting: You have an administration willing  to listen
snippet.description:
Exelon Corporation CEO Calvin Butler joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss President Biden's meeting with CEOs from a range of sectors on Thursday, what was discussed at the White House meeting, and more. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
